---
name: Wishlist Task
about: Suggest or assign a task for contributors
title: "[Wishlist]: "
labels: wishlist
assignees: ''
type: Task

---

## 📌 Background
<!-- Why is this task needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## 🎯 Task Description
<!-- Clearly describe what needs to be implemented -->

## 📦 Expected Outcome
<!-- What counts as "done"? Be specific -->
- [ ] Feature works as expected
- [ ] Code is clean and documented
- [ ] Includes tests or demo (if applicable)

## 🧩 Scope / Requirements
<!-- Constraints, APIs to use, or things to avoid -->
- 

## 🧠 Difficulty
<!-- Delete others and keep one -->
- [ ] Easy
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Hard

## 📚 References (Optional)
<!-- Links, papers, docs, examples -->
- 

## 🙋 For contributors
<!-- Instructions for contributors -->
- Comment to claim this issue
- Fork the repo and create a new branch
- Submit a PR and link this issue (e.g., `Closes #XX`)

## ✅ Checklist before PR
- [ ] I have understood the task
- [ ] My code follows project style
- [ ] I have tested my changes
